what_changed: Refined except Exception: in alert_escalation.py to explicit exceptions based on 60_second_opportunity_scan.py findings.
hypotheses: Winnie's benchmarking of ReasoningEffort will demonstrate clear latency/cost reductions for low-effort tasks.
Integrating unenforced_gate_auditor.py into the main pipeline will surface missing QA hooks across agent profiles.
